start.q: How does the digital employee work?
start.a: The digital employee is an AI trained on your salon info. It responds to clients, books appointments, and answers inquiries via WhatsApp, Telegram, and your website.

billing.a: Tokens are deducted based on conversation length. Each replied message consumes a small amount of tokens. You can track usage in real-time from the dashboard.

custom.q: Can I change the agent's name or personality?
custom.a: Yes, from Settings, you can customize the name, tone of voice, and knowledge to reflect your salon's brand.

limit.q: What happens if I run out of tokens?
limit.a: If you run out of tokens, the agent will temporarily stop responding. You can recharge immediately from the Billing page to resume service.

bookings.q: How do I get booking reports?
bookings.a: All bookings are recorded in the Bookings page in your dashboard, where you can view, confirm, or cancel them easily.

hero.title: Run Your Salon — From One Smart Platform
hero.subtitle: Manage bookings, customers, and support tickets all in one place. Get a digital presence, automate operations, and grow your client base — starting at $39/mo.

how.title: How It Works
how.step1_desc: Enter your salon info, services, and pricing in minutes — your digital profile is ready.
how.step2_desc: Build your CRM by adding clients from walk-ins, WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, or phone calls.
how.step3_desc: Log bookings, handle support tickets, and track every client relationship from one dashboard.

features.title: Everything You Need in One Place
features.crm_desc: Add and track all your clients — with their contact info, visit history, and preferred channel.
features.booking_desc: Log appointments manually or let clients book through your channels — all tracked in one calendar.
features.multi_desc: Track customers from WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, phone, or walk-in — in one CRM.
features.ticket_desc: Never miss a client request. Log, track, and resolve support tickets with ease.
features.reports_desc: Daily and weekly stats on bookings, clients, and revenue — always know where your business stands.
features.presence_desc: Get a booking-ready landing page for your salon so clients can find and book you online.

testimonials.title: What Salon Owners Are Saying
testimonials.t1_text: Finally a system that keeps all my client info in one place. I know exactly who came in, when, and what they booked.
testimonials.t2_text: My clients can book directly through Instagram now. It feels so professional — and I didn't have to do any setup myself.
testimonials.t3_text: Bookings and client management in one place has saved me so much time. I know my numbers every single day.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need technical experience to use the platform?
faq.a1: Not at all. Setup takes less than 5 minutes. The interface is simple, in Arabic and English, and our team is available to help.
faq.q2: What is included in each plan?
faq.a2: Plans are cumulative. Digital Presence ($39) includes your salon profile and manual CRM. Operations ($119) adds channel automation and smart booking. Marketing & Content ($199) adds growth tools on top.
faq.q3: Can I add customers and bookings manually?
faq.a3: Yes. Every plan lets you manually add customers, log bookings, and create support tickets — no automation needed to get started.
faq.q4: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a4: Yes. No binding contracts. Cancel anytime from your dashboard.
faq.a5: Our team connects your Instagram, WhatsApp, Telegram, and other channels for you — you don't need to configure anything technical.
faq.q6: Will clients be able to book through my social channels?
faq.a6: Yes, on the Operations plan and above. Clients can message you through Instagram, WhatsApp, or Telegram and get confirmed automatically.
faq.q7: Is my data and client data secure?
faq.a7: Absolutely. We use Supabase with full encryption. Your data is yours and will never be shared with any third party.
faq.a8: All plans start with a 14-day free trial — no credit card required. You can explore everything before committing.
